title: AI Code Assistant
description: A VS Code extension that provides intelligent code completions and refactoring suggestions using GPT-4. Features include natural language to code translation, automated documentation generation, and code smell detection.
shortDescription: AI-powered VS Code extension for smarter coding

title: Real-Time Collaboration Platform
description: A full-stack web application enabling real-time document collaboration similar to Google Docs. Uses WebSockets for live updates, operational transformation for conflict resolution, and role-based access control.
shortDescription: Google Docs alternative with live collaboration

title: API Performance Monitor
description: A comprehensive monitoring solution for REST and GraphQL APIs. Tracks response times, error rates, and provides automated alerts with root cause analysis. Includes a dashboard with real-time metrics and historical trends.

title: E-Commerce Mobile App
description: A cross-platform e-commerce mobile application built with React Native. Features include product catalog, shopping cart, secure payments via Stripe, push notifications, and order tracking.
shortDescription: Cross-platform shopping app with Stripe integration

title: Machine Learning Pipeline
description: An end-to-end ML pipeline for automated model training and deployment. Handles data preprocessing, model selection, hyperparameter tuning, and provides REST API endpoints for inference. Achieved 95% accuracy on test datasets.
shortDescription: Automated ML training and deployment pipeline
